ast.source: File is not a markdown file, skipping.
ast.target: 文件不是 Markdown 文件，跳过。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 Front Matter Timestamps 插件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically update modified time on file change
ast.target: 文件更改时自动更新修改时间

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically add created and modified timestamps to new notes
ast.target: 自动为新笔记添加创建和修改时间戳

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customise the property name for creation timestamp
ast.target: 自定义创建时间戳的属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customise the property name for modification timestamp
ast.target: 自定义修改时间戳的属性名称

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the desired date and time format using Moment.js tokens. Example: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm
ast.target: 使用 Moment.js 令牌指定所需的日期和时间格式。例如：YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay in milliseconds before adding timestamps to new notes to avoid conflicts with other plugins that also add content to new notes. The default value of 1000 milliseconds should be sufficient for most cases, but you can adjust it as needed. Set to 0 to disable the delay if you are not experiencing any issues or not using such plugins.
ast.target: 在为新笔记添加时间戳之前延迟若干毫秒，以避免与也会向新笔记添加内容的其他插件发生冲突。默认值 1000 毫秒在大多数情况下已足够，但可按需调整。若未遇到问题或未使用此类插件，可将其设为 0 以禁用延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Manage folders that are excluded from timestamp updates. You can add subfolder paths as needed. For example, 'folder/subfolder' will exclude 'subfolder' but not 'folder'.
ast.target: 管理排除时间戳更新的文件夹。可按需添加子文件夹路径。例如，'folder/subfolder' 会排除 'subfolder'，但不会排除 'folder'。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a command to run after the modified time is successfully updated
ast.target: 在修改时间成功更新后选择要运行的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable debug mode to display detailed logs
ast.target: 启用调试模式以显示详细日志
